title:
Latest quarterly dashboard for leading NZ's data - now available
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Latest quarterly dashboard for leading NZ's data - now available
Stats NZ's latest quarterly data dashboard (January to March 2019) is now available.
The dashboard profiles key deliverables under the Government Chief Data Steward function, and how they contribute to success areas:
- data-driven decisions
The dashboard also documents the number of data-related engagements within and outside of government for each quarter and captures the number of international connections that have occurred.
Dashboard - March 2019 quarter (Q3 2018/19) - HTML
Dashboard - March 2019 quarter (Q3 2018/19) [PDF 1.32 MB]
Government Chief Data Steward
Check out all dashboards on data.govt.nz.
Data leadership dashboard
More information about Stats NZ's data leadership role and initiatives is available on stats.govt.nz.
